title: Method of controlling operation of a digital radiography detector
abstract: License admission data for using a digital radiography detector are downloaded from a dedicated predefined web portal onto a dongle, fed into a workstation coupled to a digital radiography image recording system and checked at regular times to allow image recording only when the license conditions are fulfilled.
claims: Claims [CLAIMS] 1. Method of using a digital radiography detector in a digital radiography image recording system by licensing said detector, comprising the steps of - Prior to image recording, generating license admission data for using said digital radiography detector identified by means of detector identification data on a predefined web portal, - Downloading the identification data of said digital radiography detector and said license admission data from said portal onto a dongle , - Feeding said identification data and said license admission data from said dongle to a workstation coupled to said digital radiography image recording system, said workstation running software for controlling operation of the digital image recording system, - Connecting the workstation with the digital radiography detector whereupon software running on processor of the workstation checks whether license data are available for said digital radiography detector, - If said check indicates that license is available, allowing the detector to be used for image recording. 2. A method according to claim 1 wherein allowing the detector to be used for image recording comprises enabling capture of an x-ray image . 3. A method according to claim 1 wherein allowing the detector to be used for image recording comprises enabling output of a captured x- ray image from said detector. 4. A method according to claim 1 wherein said license admission data specify a period of time during which a license is available. 5. A method according to claim 1 wherein said license admission data specify a number of exposures for which a license is available.
